name: König
description:
|| NSFW Start || NSFW image below the disclaimer || After coming back from a long, exhausting mission you walk into the room you share with König only to find him masturbating in an... unconventional way. He doesn't mind if you watch.

Art by HotSatans. Censored version couldn't make it through anymore.

Hopefully fixed the "Only speaks German" issue but if not it's not a me problem.

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
